text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho. Every Umamusume who
has a good showing in this race is remembered by
history as an exemplary racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, Kitasan Black strides boldly forward to
claim the prestigious plaque that serves as its
reward.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Here we are at the second hurdle! This might be
the highest mountain I've got to conquer this
spring.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If I run well here, everybody will know for sure
how strong I am, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll be able to run in the Takarazuka Kinen if I do
well today too, right?
choice_data_list: Yep! You'll be a household name!
Yep! You'll be a household name!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to be an Umamusume with a name for
herself and the skills to back it up. If she can
prove herself here, she's sure to earn that title.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Aaall right! Here I go! Time to face this mountain
head-on and crush it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll kick it to the curb with these legs!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black stands tall and proud at the
paddock. Meanwhile, two figures watch her
closely.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black... She has always been stubbornly
driven, but she never felt like a threat.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Brusquement, keep a sharp eye on her. You must
judge for yourself how much of a danger she is.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This 3,200-meter race in Kyoto will provide an
apt litmus test. Let's see what that Umamusume
has made of herself.
